name: bpmct
html:

css: .bpmct-wrap { width: 100%; height: 100%; background: #1a0a1a; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8%; font-family: 'Courier New', monospace; box-sizing: border-box; padding: 6%; } .bpmct-name { font-size: clamp(1.6rem, 6vw, 2.8rem); font-weight: 900; color: #ff69b4; text-shadow: 0 0 12px #ff69b4, 0 0 28px #ff1493, 0 0 50px #ff69b4; letter-spacing: 0.08em; animation: bpmct-pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite; } .bpmct-badge { font-size: clamp(0.75rem, 3vw, 1.1rem); font-weight: 700; color: #fff; background: #ff1493; border-radius: 999px; padding: 4% 10%; letter-spacing: 0.05em; animation: bpmct-blink 1.2s step-start infinite; } .bpmct-role { font-size: clamp(0.65rem, 2.5vw, 1rem); color: #ff69b4; opacity: 0.85; text-align: center; letter-spacing: 0.04em; } .bpmct-link { font-size: clamp(0.55rem, 2vw, 0.85rem); color: #ff69b4; opacity: 0.6; text-decoration: none; margin-top: 2%; } @keyframes bpmct-pulse { 0%, 100% { text-shadow: 0 0 12px #ff69b4, 0 0 28px #ff1493, 0 0 50px #ff69b4; } 50% { text-shadow: 0 0 24px #ff69b4, 0 0 50px #ff1493, 0 0 80px #ff69b4; } } @keyframes bpmct-blink { 0%, 100% { opacity: 1; } 50% { opacity: 0.3; } }
